title: Over 60% turnout as Nepal votes in 'historic' polls powered by Gen Z
summary_full: Nepal's Gen Z voters turned out in large numbers for snap parliamentary elections, a significant development following September protests that reshaped the country's politics. Despite logistical challenges in the mountainous nation, preliminary turnout exceeded 60%, with young activists viewing election day as the next phase of their movement for change and accountability.
